problem_statement: ReadOnlyWorkerPhiGovDispatchAuthorizationWitness defines the Phi_gov dispatch authorization evidence boundary, but effect reconciliation still needs a schema-backed witness before any runtime worker dispatch can be enabled.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerEffectReconciliationWitness validates against a JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the witness binds the upstream Phi_gov dispatch authorization witness, UAO dispatch authorization witness, and active runtime lease admission witness

the witness requires expected effect boundaries, future observed effect evidence, worker receipt evidence, WorkerFailureReceipt obligation on error, no unexpected filesystem effects, no unexpected network effects, no unexpected connector effects, and effect reconciliation before terminal closure

the witness keeps UAO dispatch authorization, effect reconciliation, runtime dispatch admission, runtime dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, receipt append, filesystem writes, connector calls, success claims, and terminal closure denied
focused tests reject authority drift, contract drift, missing authorization input refs, admission drift, malformed payloads, and summary drift
non_goals: do not perform UAO dispatch authorization
do not emit or append runtime receipts
do not grant filesystem, connector, network, terminal closure, or success-claim authority
constraints: Foundation Mode remains local-first and witness-only
runtime dispatch remains blocked until UAO authorization, Phi_gov authorization, active runtime lease admission, WorkerFailureReceipt, and effect reconciliation evidence exist
all new artifacts must remain deterministic and read-only
evidence_required: upstream Phi_gov dispatch authorization witness validation
upstream UAO dispatch authorization witness validation
upstream active runtime lease admission witness validation
